input.launcherPlaceholder: What do you want to do today?
input.placeholder: Message MyAgents, use @ for files and / for skills...
input.companionPlaceholder: Ask Mino or delegate a task...
input.providerWarning: Verification failed. Some models may be unavailable.
input.reasoningRequirement: Requires provider support; actual behavior depends on the provider.
input.systemBusy: A system task is running. Please wait.
input.providerUnavailableDefault: Set up a model provider in Settings first.
input.autonomyWarning: Autonomous mode is enabled. The Agent may perform irreversible actions.
input.toolsEmptyExternal: Enable official CLI tools in Settings to use them with this runtime.
input.toolsEmptyBuiltin: Install and enable MCP tools to use browser automation and more.
input.pluginLoadsMcpTitle: Enabling this plugin automatically loads these MCP servers: {{names}}
input.noPluginsPrefix: No plugins yet. Install them in
input.noPluginsSuffix: from GitHub or a local path.
input.imageFilteredOnSend: {{model}} does not support images. {{count}} image(s) were filtered; only text was sent.
input.undoFilesPartial: Undid {{successCount}} file(s); {{failCount}} file(s) could not be deleted.
input.undoReferenceOnly: Reference removed, but file deletion failed.

mode.switchToThought: Press Tab to switch to Thought
mode.switchToChat: Press Tab to switch to Chat

mention.emptyThoughts: No thoughts yet. Capture one in Task Center first.
mention.thoughtSoftCap: Showing the first {{count}} matches. Type a more specific keyword.

auto.label: Act
auto.description: Agent works in the workspace and asks before using tools

fullAgency.label: Autonomous
fullAgency.description: Agent has full autonomy without manual confirmation

acceptEdits.label: Accept Edits
acceptEdits.description: Automatically accept file edits; ask for other actions

autoEdit.label: Auto Edit
autoEdit.description: Automatically accept file edits; ask for other actions

suggest.label: Suggest
suggest.description: Auto-run trusted commands; ask for everything else

auto-edit.label: Auto-Edit
auto-edit.description: Edit files automatically and run commands in the sandbox

full-auto.label: Full Auto
full-auto.description: Run autonomously in the sandbox and ask when needed

no-restrictions.label: No Restrictions
no-restrictions.description: Skip all approvals and sandbox restrictions

slashCommands.compact: Compress chat history to free context space
slashCommands.context: Show or manage the current context
slashCommands.release-notes: Generate release notes from recent commits

attachments.unsupportedImageType: Unsupported image format. Use PNG, JPG, GIF, or WebP.
attachments.imageTooLarge: Images must be 10 MB or smaller.
attachments.maxImages: You can upload at most {{count}} images.
attachments.previewFailed: Failed to generate a preview URL for image "{{name}}".
attachments.oversizedImageAsFile: Image is over 10 MB. Use Upload file or drag it from a folder to reference it as an @file.
attachments.oversizedImagesAsFile: {{count}} images are over 10 MB. Use Upload file or drag them from a folder to reference them as @files.
attachments.imagesConvertedToFiles: The current model does not support image input, so images were saved as workspace files for the model to read.
attachments.desktopRequiredForUpload: Cannot upload files in browser dev mode. Use the desktop app.
attachments.selectWorkspaceForUpload: Select a workspace before uploading files.
attachments.desktopRequiredForProcess: Cannot process files in browser dev mode. Use the desktop app.
attachments.selectWorkspaceForProcess: Select a workspace before processing files.
attachments.sessionNotReadyForImage: Cannot add image because this session is not ready.
attachments.oversizedImageAddedAsReference: Image is over 10 MB and was added as a file reference.
attachments.oversizedImagesAddedAsReference: {{count}} images are over 10 MB and were added as file references.

repetition.title: Repeated content detected
repetition.message: The same text repeats about {{count}} times ({{chars}} characters total). This often happens after speech recognition glitches in third-party input methods. Send anyway?

chrome.openInMyAgents: Open in MyAgents (continue in a new tab)

floatingBall.axPrompt: Allow Accessibility access so Mino can include selected text when summoned. You only need to grant this once.

toasts.maxImages: You can upload at most {{count}} images.

toasts.cannotUploadNoWorkspace: Select a workspace before uploading files.
toasts.cannotProcessDevMode: Cannot process files in browser dev mode. Use the desktop app.

toasts.imageTooLargeAsFile: Image is over 10 MB. Drag it from a folder to reference it as an @file.
toasts.imagesTooLargeAsFile: {{count}} images are over 10 MB. Drag them from a folder to reference them as @files.
toasts.imageConvertedToFile: The current model does not support image input, so images were saved as workspace files for the model to read.
toasts.imageTooLargeAddedAsFile: Image is over 10 MB and was added as a file reference.
toasts.imagesTooLargeAddedAsFile: {{count}} images are over 10 MB and were added as file references.

filePreview.externalUpdateTitle: The file changed externally. Local edits have not overwritten it.
filePreview.copyFullTextPreviewFailed: Preview failed, so full text cannot be copied

toasts.externalUpdateConflict: The file changed externally. Local edits were not overwritten.
toasts.copyWhileLoading: The file is still loading. Try copying again shortly.
toasts.copyAfterPreviewFailed: Preview failed, so copying is unavailable.

deleteDialog.message: Delete "{{name}}"? It will be moved to the system Trash.
deleteDialog.multiMessage: Delete the selected {{count}} files/folders? They will be moved to the system Trash.

errors.batchUploadTooLarge: Batch upload cannot exceed {{maxMb}} MB (current {{currentMb}} MB). Drag large files directly into the folder.
errors.tooManyNotes: Too many notes were created in the current minute. Try again later.

toasts.fileMissing: File does not exist or was deleted
toasts.unsupportedPreview: This file type cannot be previewed yet. Use the context menu to open it.

toasts.autoRenamedMany: {{count}} items were automatically renamed because of naming conflicts

toasts.copiedSelection: {{action}} {{target}}. Press {{shortcut}} in the target folder to paste.
toasts.clipboardStale: The system clipboard has new content, so the file clipboard expired. Copy again before pasting.
toasts.pastePartialFailed: Some items could not be pasted: {{error}}
toasts.movePartialFailed: Some items could not be moved: {{error}}
toasts.undoWithRenameFailures: Undone ({{count}} item(s) could not restore the original filename)

headlines.needsCodexLogin: Sign in to Codex to continue

truncate.result: ... [Result too long; showing the first {{shown}} of {{total}} characters]

image.copyFallbackPath: Could not copy the image; copied the local path instead

widget.scriptErrorPrefix: This component's script could not run, usually because the generated code has a syntax error:

dropZone.message: Release to add files to the workspace
dropZone.subtitle: Non-image files will be copied to myagents_files and referenced automatically.

agentError.title: AI call failed:
agentError.imageTooLargePrefix: The tool screenshot exceeds the model limit.

selection.elaboratePrompt: About the quoted content: explain in more depth

providerSwitch.defaultMessage: This chat history cannot be reliably reused with the target model. The current chat will stay open and a new chat will be created in a new tab.

codexTarget.title: New Codex session required
codexTarget.message: Codex subscription chats must be created by the Codex Runtime and cannot reuse the current chat history. The current chat will stay open and a Codex chat will be created in a new tab.

codexCurrent.message: This chat was created by the Codex Runtime and cannot switch directly to a built-in model provider. The current Codex chat will stay open and the target model will open in a new tab.

runtimeBacked.message: The target provider uses a different Runtime, so the current chat history cannot be reused. The current chat will stay open and a new chat will be created in a new tab.

sameProvider.message: "{{targetModel}}" requires an independent session and cannot reuse this model history. The current chat will stay open and a new chat will be created in a new tab.

crossProvider.message: This chat was created under "{{currentProviderName}}". After switching to "{{targetProviderName}}", the history context cannot be reliably reused. The current chat will stay open and the target model will open in a new tab.

crossRuntime.title: New session required to send
crossRuntime.message: This historical chat was created by "{{sessionRuntime}}", but external Runtime support is currently disabled, so it cannot continue in the original session. The current chat will stay open and this message will be sent in a new "{{currentRuntime}}" chat.

runtimeSwitch.title: New Runtime session required
runtimeSwitch.message: This chat is already bound to "{{currentRuntime}}" and cannot switch to "{{targetRuntime}}" in the same history. The current chat will stay open, a "{{targetRuntime}}" chat will open in a new tab, and the workspace default Runtime will be updated to "{{targetRuntime}}".

rewind.title: Time rewind
rewind.message: Your chat history and file modification state will both rewind to before this turn.

fork.title: Create branch
fork.message: A new chat branch will be created from this point and opened in a new tab. The original chat will not be changed.

toasts.composerLockedByCron: A scheduled task is running in this chat. Stop the task before changing this setting.
toasts.providerUnavailable: The Provider pinned to this chat, "{{providerId}}", is unavailable because its API key is missing or it has been disabled. Add the key in Settings, or switch Provider in the model picker before sending.
toasts.snapshotProviderIncomplete: This historical chat is missing Provider information. Select the model again in the model picker first.
toasts.previewWorkspaceUnavailable: Cannot open preview because the workspace file service is unavailable.
toasts.previewUnsupportedType: This file type is not supported by MyAgents preview yet.
toasts.autoSendRestoredDraft: Send failed. Your draft was restored; please try again.
toasts.configPartiallySaved: Configuration was not fully saved and may revert after restart.
toasts.searchUnsupported: In-page search is not supported in this environment because the CSS Highlight API is missing.
toasts.codexSubscriptionNeedsSession: Codex subscription requires a new Codex session. Switch in the model picker and confirm the new session first.
toasts.queueLimit: You can queue at most 5 messages.
toasts.channelNotificationFailed: The new chat took over the Channel, but the IM notification failed.
toasts.runtimeSwitchCreateFailed: Runtime switch failed: cannot create a new chat.
toasts.runtimeSwitchDefaultUpdateFailed: Runtime switch failed: the workspace default Runtime could not be updated.
toasts.runtimeSwitchDefaultUpdateWarning: The new chat will still open, but the workspace default Runtime could not be updated.
toasts.runtimeSwitchTabOpenFailed: Runtime switch failed: the new tab could not be opened.
toasts.runtimeSwitchChannelTransferFailed: The new chat opened, but the Channel binding was not migrated. The workspace Runtime was restored.
toasts.providerSwitchTargetUnavailable: Failed to create new chat: the target Provider is unavailable.
toasts.providerSwitchDefaultSaveFailed: New chat created, but the Agent default model could not be saved.
toasts.providerSwitchChannelTransferFailed: The new chat opened, but the Channel binding was not migrated.
toasts.imagesNotTransferred: Image attachments cannot be carried into the new chat. Add them again.
toasts.reselectModelFirst: Select the model again in the model picker first.
toasts.rewindFailedRetry: Time rewind failed. Please try again.
toasts.forkOpenFailed: Failed to create branch: cannot open a new chat.

unknown.label: Unknown reason ({{reason}})
unknown.detail: The SDK returned an unknown terminal_reason={{reason}}. This may be a new enum value from an SDK upgrade.

max_turns.label: Maximum turns reached
max_turns.detail: This turn reached the maximum turn limit. Start a new chat to continue, or adjust the Agent maxTurns setting.

prompt_too_long.label: Context is full
prompt_too_long.detail: This chat has reached the model context window limit. Shorten history, remove attachments, or start a new chat to continue.

blocking_limit.label: API quota exhausted
blocking_limit.detail: The provider returned a rate-limit or quota error. Check the provider quota or wait for it to reset.

rapid_refill_breaker.label: Requests are too frequent; backing off
rapid_refill_breaker.detail: The SDK triggered its rapid refill breaker and is backing off before retrying. It should recover automatically.

aborted_tools.label: Tool execution was interrupted
aborted_tools.detail: A tool call was interrupted by the user or system. Resend the message to let the AI retry.

aborted_streaming.label: Response was interrupted
aborted_streaming.detail: The streaming response stopped before completion. Resend the message to generate it again.

tool_deferred.label: Tool execution deferred
tool_deferred.detail: Some tool calls were deferred and this turn has returned.

background_requested.label: Moved to background execution
background_requested.detail: The SDK moved the remaining work to a background task and ended the foreground response. Check background task notifications for progress.

stop_hook_prevented.label: Stop Hook prevented completion
stop_hook_prevented.detail: A project Stop Hook prevented the session from ending. Check the Hook logic or settings.json.

hook_stopped.label: Stopped by Hook
hook_stopped.detail: A Hook requested that this turn stop. Check Hook configuration or logs to find the trigger.

image_error.label: Image processing failed
image_error.detail: An image content block could not be processed by the model, likely because the format is unsupported or the image is too large (>8000px).

model_error.label: Model returned an error
model_error.detail: The model returned an error. Check logs for the specific cause.

systemStatus.compacting: Chat is long. Creating an intelligent summary...

messageList.starting: Starting AI... first launch may take a while.
